query: amateur snapshot with crooked tilted horizon, accidentally rotated photo, off-kilter handheld shot
message: composition_and_structure / unconventional_framing — anti_aesthetic. Off-kilter, dutch-angle, accidentally rotated handheld snapshots with informal vernacular framing. Includes parties, sports wipeouts, fallen signs, casual portraiture, awkward angles.

response.objective_caption: Two children sit one behind the other on a yellow snow sled with orange runners, moving across a snow-covered slope. The child in front wears a black knit hat, a dark jacket with a light blue section, black snow pants, and dark gloves. The child in back wears a black hat with a bright yellow mohawk-style tuft, a blue and gray jacket, dark blue snow pants, and gloves. The surrounding landscape is covered in white snow.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Two children sit one behind the other on a yellow snow sled with orange runners, moving across a snow-covered slope with motion blur softening the scene and conveying dynamic speed. The child in front wears a black knit hat, a dark jacket with a light blue section, black snow pants, and dark gloves. The child in back wears a black hat with a bright yellow mohawk-style tuft, a blue and gray jacket, dark blue snow pants, and gloves. The blur streaks the snowy background and the figures, creating a sense of rapid movement.
